rationale.completeness: Core requirements addressed: terminal detection, ANSI rendering, tool result streaming, graceful degradation. However, callLlmWithStreaming is imported in agent.ts but no actual usage shown - ThinkingDeltaEvent emission from LLM streaming appears to be missing or incomplete in the diff.
rationale.correctness: Terminal detection logic is sound (isTTY, NO_COLOR, env vars). StreamController buffering and graceful degradation work correctly. Minor concerns: no synchronization for concurrent writes in buffer (likely fine for single-threaded), and the CLI override connection to agent config could be clearer.
rationale.style: TypeScript usage is proper with good type definitions. Follows project conventions - exports from index files, types in separate files. Some minor inconsistency between private vs private readonly fields across files.
rationale.quality: Good separation of concerns across terminal-detection.ts, stream-controller.ts, and ansi-renderer.ts. Clean abstractions. However, the actual integration of streaming into the agent loop appears incomplete since callLlmWithStreaming is imported but never invoked in the visible diff.
